errors.description: The request shape, filter set, or aggregation is invalid for the approved reporting contract.
One or more requested metric names are not enabled for the reporting tool.
The requested dimension or granularity is not enabled for the reporting tool.
The requested date range is missing, inverted, or exceeds the approved maximum span.
The caller is authenticated but not allowed to access the requested reporting scope.
The configured reporting provider is temporarily unavailable.
The reporting provider did not complete within the bounded tool timeout.
The reporting provider or MCP transport rejected the request because of rate limiting.
The normalized dataset exceeded the configured result-row or byte limits.
The provider returned data that could not be normalized to the frozen structured dataset schema.
An unexpected server-side failure prevented the reporting tool from returning a safe dataset.
